title: Transitioning Farming Systems for Resilience and Food Security in Malawi
abstract: A two-day Stakeholders’ Workshop on Sustainable Transitioning of Farming Systems, held on 12-13 December 2024 at the Sunbird Capital Hotel in Lilongwe, brought together key agricultural stakeholders, researchers, policymakers, and development partners to explore solutions to enhance the resilience and sustainability of Malawi’s mixed farming systems. Organized by the International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics (ICRISAT) under the CGIAR Initiative on Sustainable Intensification of Mixed Farming Systems (SI-MFS), the event highlighted critical pathways for improving productivity, resilience, and food security in southern Africa's agricultural sector.
